title: Indian-Style Flatbread with Peppery Cheese
description: A simple yet flavorful flatbread dish from the Indian subcontinent. The peppery cheese adds a delightful twist to the classic recipe.
instructions: Cut the flatbread into smaller pieces and place them on a baking sheet.
Sprinkle the shredded Irish cheese over the flatbread pieces.
Grind the peppercorns and sprinkle them over the cheese.
Bake in the preheated oven for 8-10 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove from the oven and brush with water to give it a slightly crispy texture.
